name: ghost-protocol-readonly-mcp
description: Ghost Protocol MCP server for agent discovery, payment requirement lookup, and GhostWire quote/status helpers.

tools.name: list_agents
tools.description: List GhostRank agents with optional search query and pagination.

tools.name: get_agent_details
tools.description: Fetch details for one agent by agent_id (or address).

tools.name: get_payment_requirements
tools.description: Fetch authoritative payment requirements for a service slug.

tools.name: get_wire_quote
tools.description: Create a GhostWire quote for a potential escrow job.

tools.name: get_wire_job_status
tools.description: Fetch current status for one GhostWire job by job_id.
